name: IndianOil Kotak Credit Card
exclusions: fuel and category caps apply monthly as per Kotak terms
reward point cash redemption value revised by Kotak from June 2025
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on retail spends of Rs 50,000 in the previous anniversary year
additionalBenefits: Save 5% on fuel spends at IndianOil fuel pumps
Earn 2% back as reward points on grocery and dining spends
1% fuel surcharge waiver up to monthly cap
Interest-free credit period up to 48 days

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Kotak Mahindra Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Kotak Mahindra Bank approval criteria
